mentions.note: Semiconductor equipment supplier benefiting from chip shortage for storage/memory. Made new intraday high today; CEO Gary Dickerson well-aware of company's importance in food chain.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker benefiting from huge chip shortage, especially for storage and memory. Made new intraday high; go for it when things clear up.
Semiconductor equipment beneficiary of chip storage/memory shortage; CEO Gary Dickerson well-positioned in the food chain. New intraday high despite tough market backdrop.

Semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker benefiting from memory and storage chip shortages. Made new high despite brutal tape. CEO Gary Dickerson understands company's critical role in supply chain. When things clear up, buy AMAT.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment beneficiary of chip shortage for storage/memory. CEO Gary Dickerson recently on show; critical to semiconductor food chain.

CEO confirms 'greatest time in industry history'; semiconductor equipment business guiding 30%+ growth YoY; record earnings, revenue, margins. 8+ quarter customer visibility ensures sustained demand; advanced packaging, foundry logic, DRAM segments all fastest-growing in AI.

Semiconductor capital equipment; can't produce enough machines to boost semi production; supply bottleneck persistent; Thursday earnings and conference call; similar position to competitors Lam Research and KLA.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment supplier benefiting from chip shortage and expansion capex.
Best capex play alongside Lam Research; semiconductor equipment beneficiary; critical for AI-driven capex cycle.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment; only way to alleviate chip shortages; strong IP; Cramer rates it great buy alongside Lam Research and KLA.
Semiconductor equipment company riding wave of chip manufacturing investment driven by AI demand.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; less risky than memory plays; memory shortage will drive business; buy on oil-induced pullback.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker up 29-39% since Jan 1; positioned for sustained orders as Taiwan Semi, Micron, Intel expand production capacity through 2029.
Chip equipment supplier gaining on shortage tailwinds; Intel miss provides opportunity.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker benefiting from memory supply race; but if supply catches up, pricing collapses—trim positions after parabolic moves.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; Micron $100B fab will be full of their hardware; critical to chip expansion; strong stock performance.
Semiconductor capital equipment company rallying; benefits from broad equipment and storage demand cycle.
Capital equipment maker benefiting from memory-chip manufacturing expansion; high demand, supply-constrained pricing environment supportive.
Semiconductor equipment supplier up 131% YTD; CEO Kerry Diggerson secured unprecedented long-term contracts assuring multiple future earnings bumps.
Semcap equipment supplier doing best to solve memory shortage; less direct play than SpaceX for future data center satellites.
